text:
> support for sixteen-bit pixel quantums should be disabled by default,
> since generated EPS file is incompatible with Ghostscript.

Please  specify  your test line in details. My simple tests as generating
EPS from GIF produce compatible files for IM 5.3.6

-- 
Andrey A. Chernov
